rag_rules: Fuse AGREE content only inside a valid `annex agree {** ... **};` block.
Keep type-scope contract content in component type owners and implementation-scope bindings in component implementation owners.
Respect AADL visibility: do not place references to subcomponent ports in a type owner unless they are exposed through valid in-scope names.
Use the source AADL structure as the authority for owner identity, existing declarations, and legal scope.
generic_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture and make the smallest owner-local edit needed to add the annex.
Do not rename owners, move unrelated declarations, or alter non-AGREE content while fusing.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: The annex wrapper must use the exact AADL form `annex agree {** ... **};`.
When fusing into an implementation owner, preserve valid ordering relative to existing subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-only content in a type owner, or type-level content in an implementation owner, just to make insertion easier.
Do not inject out-of-scope references, including raw subcomponent ports or property/unit tokens that are not visible names in the chosen owner.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
